# Les Espanters

> Les Espanters is an instrumental duo based in Montpellier, France. They fuse traditional oud with electric guitar, and acoustic guitar with banjo, to create a unique Mediterranean and Oriental soundscape that travels from desert to mountains. Available for concerts, festivals, weddings, restaurants, and private events throughout Hérault and Occitanie.

## Genre and instruments

World music, Mediterranean, Oriental, folk, blues, instrumental. Featured instruments: oud, electric guitar, acoustic guitar, banjo.

## Service area

Montpellier, Nîmes, Béziers, Sète, Toulouse, Perpignan, and the rest of Occitanie (Southern France).

- [Criquet Cowboy (MP3)](https://lesespanters.lourock.com/media/criquet-cowboy.mp3)
- [La Jument Maquam (MP3)](https://lesespanters.lourock.com/media/la-jument-maquam.mp3)
- [Sable Rouge (MP4 video)](https://lesespanters.lourock.com/media/sable-rouge.mp4)

## Booking and contact

Part of the LouRock collective. Booking inquiries via [lourock.com](https://lourock.com) or Instagram [@lesespanters](https://www.instagram.com/lesespanters/).
